<<THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD>> <<THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD>>  

1. [DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X2, SIGMA_Y2, AND SIGMA_XY GIVEN THE DATA]  

2. [FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs]  

[STATE THE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES, THE TEST STATISTIC, AND THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF ALPHA EQUAL TO ZERO POINT FIVE]  

[THE RESPONSE MUST CONTAIN AT LEAST EIGHT PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS SUCH AS ADDRESS]  

[IN YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE, REFRAIN FROM THE USE OF ANY COMMAS]  

[ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKETS]  

[THE RESPONSE MUST BE IN ENGLISH AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS]  

[WRAP EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS SUCH AS I AM AT HOME WITH MY CUTE DOG]  

[THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD] [THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD]
